message:
chore(release): bump frankentui workspace to 0.4.0

Highlights since 0.3.1:
- feat(pane-web): handle WebGPU context loss + render stall interruptions
- feat(wasm): expose paneContextLost + paneRenderStalled bindings
- perf(pane-web): defer wasm runner pane log formatting
- perf(markdown): math cache reuse optimization
- fix(pane): coalesce resize history by gesture
- test(wasm): cover RunnerCore pane_context_lost + pane_render_stalled

All workspace member crates and pinned `path + version` cross-deps moved to 0.4.0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -25,7 +25,7 @@ members = [
 exclude = ["fuzz"]
 
 [workspace.package]
-version = "0.3.1"
+version = "0.4.0"
 edition = "2024"
 repository = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankentui"

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "doctor_frankentui"
-version = "0.3.1"
+version = "0.4.0"
 edition = "2024"
 publish = false
 license-file = "../../LICENSE"
@@ -25,7 +25,7 @@ fastapi-output = { version = "0.2.0", default-features = false }
 sqlmodel-console = "0.2.0"
 sha2 = "0.10.9"
 regex-lite = "0.1.6"
-ftui-runtime = { path = "../ftui-runtime", version = "0.3.1", default-features = false }
+ftui-runtime = { path = "../ftui-runtime", version = "0.4.0", default-features = false }
 
 [dev-dependencies]
 proptest = "1.7.0"

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "ftui-a11y"
-version = "0.3.1"
+version = "0.4.0"
 edition = "2024"
 license-file = "../../LICENSE"
 description = "Accessibility layer for FrankenTUI"
@@ -12,7 +12,7 @@ keywords = ["tui", "terminal", "ui", "accessibility", "a11y"]
 categories = ["command-line-interface", "gui", "accessibility"]
 
 [dependencies]
-ftui-core = { path = "../ftui-core", version = "0.3.1" }
+ftui-core = { path = "../ftui-core", version = "0.4.0" }
 ahash = "0.8"
 
 [dev-dependencies]

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "ftui-backend"
-version = "0.3.1"
+version = "0.4.0"
 edition = "2024"
 license-file = "../../LICENSE"
 description = "Backend traits for FrankenTUI: platform abstraction for input, presentation, and time."
@@ -12,5 +12,5 @@ keywords = ["tui", "terminal", "ui", "ftui", "frankentui"]
 categories = ["command-line-interface", "gui"]
 
 [dependencies]
-ftui-core = { path = "../ftui-core", version = "0.3.1" }
-ftui-render = { path = "../ftui-render", version = "0.3.1" }
+ftui-core = { path = "../ftui-core", version = "0.4.0" }
+ftui-render = { path = "../ftui-render", version = "0.4.0" }

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "ftui-core"
-version = "0.3.1"
+version = "0.4.0"
 edition = "2024"
 license-file = "../../LICENSE"
 description = "Terminal lifecycle, capabilities, and event parsing for FrankenTUI."

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "ftui-i18n"
-version = "0.3.1"
+version = "0.4.0"
 edition = "2024"
 license-file = "../../LICENSE"
 description = "Localization catalog and interpolation utilities for FrankenTUI."

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "ftui-layout"
-version = "0.3.1"
+version = "0.4.0"
 edition = "2024"
 license-file = "../../LICENSE"
 description = "Flex and grid layout solvers for FrankenTUI."
@@ -12,7 +12,7 @@ keywords = ["tui", "terminal", "ui", "ftui", "frankentui"]
 categories = ["command-line-interface", "gui"]
 
 [dependencies]
-ftui-core = { path = "../ftui-core", version = "0.3.1" }
+ftui-core = { path = "../ftui-core", version = "0.4.0" }
 rustc-hash = "2.1"
 serde = { version = "1.0.227", features = ["derive"] }
 smallvec = "1.15"
@@ -21,7 +21,7 @@ smallvec = "1.15"
 blake3 = "1.6"
 criterion = { version = "0.8.2", features = ["html_reports"] }
 ftui-harness = { path = "../ftui-harness" }
-ftui-render = { path = "../ftui-render", version = "0.3.1" }
+ftui-render = { path = "../ftui-render", version = "0.4.0" }
 proptest = "1.7.0"

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]

-version = "0.3.1"
+version = "0.4.0"
 edition = "2024"
 license-file = "../../LICENSE"

@@ -13,7 +13,7 @@ categories = ["command-line-interface", "gui"]
 
 [dependencies]
 frankenterm-core = { version = "0.2.0", features = ["ws-codec"] }
-ftui-core = { path = "../ftui-core", version = "0.3.1", features = ["crossterm"] }
+ftui-core = { path = "../ftui-core", version = "0.4.0", features = ["crossterm"] }
 portable-pty = "0.9.0"
 serde_json = "1.0.145"
 time = { version = "0.3.44", features = ["formatting"] }

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]

-version = "0.3.1"
+version = "0.4.0"
 edition = "2024"
 license-file = "../../LICENSE"

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]

-version = "0.3.1"
+version = "0.4.0"
 edition = "2024"

@@ -14,15 +14,15 @@ categories = ["command-line-interface", "gui"]

-ftui-render = { path = "../ftui-render", version = "0.3.1" }
+ftui-render = { path = "../ftui-render", version = "0.4.0" }

-ftui-core = { path = "../ftui-core", version = "0.3.1" }
+ftui-core = { path = "../ftui-core", version = "0.4.0" }
 tracing-test = "0.2.5"
